name: claude-repurpose
description: Content Repurposing Engine for Claude Code. Transforms any content (YouTube videos, blog posts, podcasts, local files) into 17+ platform-optimized outputs for Twitter/X, Threads, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok, Pinterest, Snapchat, Facebook, YouTube Community, Skool, Discord, Reddit, Quora, Medium, WhatsApp Channels, Telegram, and email newsletters. Includes AI image generation via /banana, publishing calendars, poll generation, SEO metadata, and brand voice adaptation.
